name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 green or red pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1 In a one-quart casserole, combine the onion, garlic, peppers, and olive oil.
2 Microwave covered at High (100%) for 3 minutes or until vegetables are softened. Stir in tomatoes, vinegar (balsamic or red wine, add according to taste), and coriander. Season sauce with salt and sugar. Refrigerate until ready to use. Makes 2 cups of sauce.
